news.title: VERAXA Unveils Cancer Therapy Platform, Sparks Partnering Talks at BIO 2026
news.summary: By Karen Roman Veraxa Biotech AG (Nasdaq: VRXA) reported in vitro proof-of-concept data validating its BiTAC-ADC platform for cancer therapies, with selective tumor cell killing while sparing healthy cells. The company will showcase partnering opportunities for its platform at the BIO International Convention in San Diego, California, taking place on June 22-25, 2026, it stated […] The post VERAXA

news.title: Genmab’s EPCORE Data Deepens Lymphoma Profile As Investors Weigh Upside
news.summary: Genmab (CPSE:GMAB) released new subgroup data from its pivotal Phase 3 EPCORE FL-1 trial of epcoritamab plus rituximab and lenalidomide in relapsed or refractory follicular lymphoma. The company also reported positive results from additional EPCORE studies in elderly patients with newly diagnosed diffuse large B cell lymphoma who are not candidates for standard chemotherapy. news.title: DARZALEX royalties drive Genmab’s Q1 revenue higher amid expansion push
news.summary: Investing.com -- Genmab reported a 25% year-on-year increase in first-quarter revenue for 2026, driven by strong royalty income from blockbuster cancer drug DARZALEX and multiple sclerosis treatment Kesimpta, as the Danish biotech company continued investing heavily in its late-stage oncology pipeline.
